Let $base
  Filter((service == "payment-service"))
    Scan(main)
      pushdown.field_predicate: (service == "payment-service")
Let $pay_errs
  Filter(((service == "payment-service") and (status == 500)))
    Scan(main)
      pushdown.field_predicate: (service == "payment-service")
      pushdown.field_predicate: (status == 500)
Aggregate(count(), sum(amount_cents) as total [partial])
  Filter(((service == "payment-service") and (status == 500)))
    Scan(main)
      pushdown.field_predicate: (service == "payment-service")
      pushdown.field_predicate: (status == 500)
      pushdown.columns: [_raw, _source, _time, amount_cents, service, status]
